name: smoketest
description: Discover web app user flows and generate reviewable Smoketest flows from local code, browser exploration, and authenticated environments.

interface.shortDescription: Discover user flows and draft Smoketest tests.
interface.longDescription: Use browser exploration and code analysis to discover public and authenticated web app user flows, draft reviewable Smoketest flow markdown, and apply approved flows through the Smoketest CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use Smoketest to discover browser flows from this repo.
Draft Smoketest flows for this URL and codebase.
Apply approved Smoketest flow drafts with the CLI.
